description: Perform forensic analysis on the spam emails in the Junk folder to identify originating servers. Create a folder named 'Forensic-Evidence' and move at least three suspicious emails into it. Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/forensic_report.txt analyzing at least five spam emails; for each, include the Subject, From address, Return-Path, and the originating IP address or server found in the bottom-most 'Received' header. Draft an email to 'abuse-reports@company.com' with the subject 'Spam Forensic Analysis' summarizing these findings.
